name: easy-pdf-sign-helper-agent
description: Local PKCS#11 signing agent for Easy PDF Sign (Phase 1)

scripts.build:win: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --target node22-win-x64 --output release/easy-pdf-sign-helper.exe --config pkg.config.json
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --target node22-linux-x64 --output release/easy-pdf-sign-helper-linux --config pkg.config.json
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --target node22-macos-x64 --output release/easy-pdf-sign-helper-macos --config pkg.config.json
